options.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run --extra dev pytest -q; else python3 -m pip install -e ../analysis >/tmp/chitin-argus-dep-install.log 2>&1 && python3 -m pip install -e '.[dev]' >/tmp/chitin-argus-pip-install.log 2>&1 && python3 -m pytest -q; fi

python3 -m compileall -q . && if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run --extra dev pytest -q; else python3 -m pip install -e ../analysis >/tmp/chitin-argus-dep-install.log 2>&1 && python3 -m pip install -e '.[dev]' >/tmp/chitin-argus-pip-install.log 2>&1 && python3 -m pytest -q; fi
